name: Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario Atrio Reit Recebiveis Imobiliarios
summary: Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario Atrio Reit Recebiveis Imobiliarios is a real estate investment fund (FII) in Brazil that invests in receivables related to the real estate market (recebíveis imobiliários). These receivables are typically backed by mortgages or other real estate-related debt. The fund aims to provide income to investors through these investments.
